title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week brought significant platform reliability improvements that will reduce session startup errors and interruptions. OpsPal now automatically detects and fixes missing components when you start a session, while enhanced Salesforce integrations prevent common configuration errors that could block your workflows.

entries.headline: Platform automatically cleans up outdated plugins when you start sessions
Salesforce plugin startup works more reliably across all environments
details: Removes outdated quality monitoring components that were causing conflicts
Streamlines plugin initialization to prevent startup failures

entries.headline: Enhanced Salesforce field and record type management prevents common errors
details: Prevents invisible field additions when Dynamic Forms is enabled on your pages
Automatically assigns new record types to System Administrator profile to avoid permission errors
Reduces session interruptions from routing conflicts

entries.headline: Platform automatically installs missing components and shows clear error messages
details: Detects and fixes missing dependencies when you start sessions
Provides clear instructions when manual fixes are needed
Runs automatic repairs in the background for common issues

entries.headline: Resolved false error messages about missing packages during session startup
